title: Easy Sapling Cutter 🪚
description: Craft Any Sapling in The StoneCutter!
body:
![get started](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9496bd3b8683af5f686b263d826f187c4ce4335e.png)
**Easy Sapling Cutter** makes crafting much simpler! With this mod, you can use the stonecutter to turn just one crafting sapling into any sapling variant — oak, dark oak wood, birch, and more. No need to search the whole world; crafting wood has never been easier!

![line](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1576de35359994bd3ee91202445fdcdaaaf81b98.png)
Craft the ( Crafting Sapling ) in a crafting table with any sapling & Any leaves

![sappling](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bbc6e80e94e8a3499501348f65bb9a4b95d97cf6.png)

Place the ( Crafting Sapling ) in a stonecutter to craft any sapling you want!

![any sappling](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fa442fe2a3fb03bc112bb486990f85188c03b159.png)

**Mod idea by @Politie.Tessa Discord server member!**


![intelij](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2f981cdb0f9bd8d718bf44ee4eb86d402e673891.png)

This mod have been created with IntelliJ

#AD
